title: 3 Peices Baby Girl Beige, Cream and Pink Cable Bow Headbands For Infant Child Girl Hair Accessories
features: Versatile Set: This set includes 3 stylish and comfortable baby headbands in neutral nude tones and the floral pattern are perfect for any occasion. Great for every day use, birthdays, baby showers and gifts for new parents.
High-Quality Material: Crafted from soft and stretchy nylon cable knit fabric, these headbands are gentle on your Baby Girl's delicate skin.
Adorable Design: Each bow headband features an eye-catching knotted bow detail that adds a touch of elegance.
Adjustable Fit: The flexible material allows for a secure yet comfortable fit, suitable for newborns to toddlers.
Easy Care: These headbands are machine-washable for hassle-free cleaning and maintenance.
description: Elevate your little one's style with these adorable baby girl headbands. Crafted from soft and stretchy nylon, these headbands feature a charming cable-knit pattern and an oversized bow detail that adds a touch of whimsy. Available in a neutral colours, beige, nude and floral patterend, these headbands complement a variety of outfits and occasions. With three pieces included, you'll always have a spare on hand. Comfortable and fashionable, these headbands are the perfect accessory for your baby's wardrobe. Dimensions: 15 cm x 9 cm (approximately).
